evals.prompt: Delineate the watershed upstream of this gauge station from a 30 m DEM.
expected_behavior: Uses a DTM, masks nodata, reprojects so horizontal units match vertical
Conditions with breach-before-fill, D8 flow direction, snaps the pour point to the high-accumulation cell
Cross-checks watershed area against authoritative basin data

evals.prompt: Compute slope from this EPSG:4326 SRTM tile.
expected_behavior: Flags the unit mismatch (degrees vs meters)
Reprojects to a projected CRS (or applies a latitude-dependent z-factor) before slope
States slope units and cell size with the result

evals.prompt: What can be seen from this proposed observation tower site?
expected_behavior: Uses a DSM (or DTM + feature heights), not bare earth, and says which
Sets observer/target heights explicitly and handles curvature/refraction beyond ~5 km
Delivers parameters in the output metadata
